description: Style NoteSnag a pair of shree's patiala pants for the authentic Desi vibe. Get your summer prints right with this lovely printed piece. Pair it with short ethnic kurtas (preferably monochomes with zari bordering that end just below the drawstring) The conservative at heart can always team this with a longish kurta. We recommend adding on a boho belt (like the pieces brand that myntra stocks) with the long kurtas for a boho chic style.   Product DetailsMulticolored patiala pants with overtones of red and purple, has a slim waist band with a drawstring, tightly stitched pleats at the front and back that flare out below the hip region, the pants flare at the seat region up to the knee and taper from the knee towards the hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 32) is wearing a size M
